TRIAL MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-20-2016 IN DEPT. 503, RESPONDENTS AND REAL PARTIES IN INTEREST'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE IS GRANTED. CASE NO. CPF-16-514811 AND CASE NO. CPF-16-514892 ARE CONSOLIDATED FOR ALL PURPOSES. THE CONSOLIDATED CASE SHALL PROCEED IN DEPARTMENT 503. CASE NO. 514892 SHALL BE CONSIDERED THE LEAD CASE. ALL SUBSEQUENT PAPERS TO BE FILED IN THE LEAD CASE NO. CPF-16-514892. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. (SEE MINI MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING.) JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG, REPORTER: RENEE SERA OF HANNAH KAUFMAN & ASSOCIATES, CSR #7435 (503)
JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF RESPONDENT AND REAL PARTIES IN INTEREST (REFER TO FILING IN LEAD CASE #514892 ENTERED ON JUL-18-2016)

calendar.matters:
MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS , CPF-16-514892 WITH CASE CPF-16-514811
Off Calendar Apr-20-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Susan Brandt-Hawley of BRANDT-HAWLEY LAW GROUP (707-938-3908), for petitioner Mission Bay Alliance
Thomas N. Lippe of LAW OFFICES OF THOMAS N. LIPPE, APC (415-777-5604), for petitioner Mission Bay Alliance
Patrick M. Soluri and Osha R. Meserve of SOLURI MESERVE (916-455-7300) for petitioner: Mission Bay Alliance
Brian F. Crossman, Deputy City Attorney (415-554-4690), appearing for Respondents City & County of San Francisco (CCSF), CCSF Planning Department, CCSF Planning Commission, CCSF Municipal Transportation Agency, CCSF Board of Supervisors, CCSF Board of Appeals, CCSF Entertainment Commission
Whitman F. Manley of REMY, MOOSE & MANLEY (916-443-2745), appearing for real parties in interest GWS Arena LLC and David Kelly
Christopher J. Butcher of THOMAS LAW GROUP (916-287-9292), appearing for respondents Office of Community Investment and Infrastructure, and Tiffany Bohee

RULING:
RESPONDENTS' AND REAL PARTIES IN INTEREST'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Respondents and Real Parties in Interest's motion to consolidate is granted. Case no. CPF-16-514811 and case no. CPF-16-514892 are consolidated for all purposes. The consolidated case shall proceed in Department 503. Henceforth case no. 514892 shall be considered the lead case. The motion is granted on alternative grounds: consolidation is mandated by Public Resources Code 21185, or alternatively, the Court finds support for consolidation in the Rules of Court that dictate AB 900 actions, including CRC 3.2226(c)(4), or alternatively, the two actions warrant consolidation pursuant to C.C.P. 1048. All subsequent papers to be filed in the lead case no. CPF-16-514892. Prevailing party is to prepare a proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Reporter: Renee Sera of HANNAH KAUFMAN & ASSOCIATES, CSR #7435 (415-337-2077) (503/GLW)
